title: The Dresden Codex: The Flood and the New Creation
description: The only surviving pre-Columbian Maya text on the great flood: celestial serpents pour water upon the world, destroying and renewing it.
introduction: The only surviving pre-Columbian Maya text on the great flood: celestial serpents pour water upon the world, destroying and renewing it.

translation.original_text: The great serpents of the sky opened their mouths and the waters poured forth.
